name: Escape the lava
description: Escape the Lava In this game you are a ball, and your goal is to collect points and dodge obstacles. You can buy skins, in the store. - Green - Red - Blue - Pink - Glowy - White - Black - Mat - Glass ball . . . and much more . . . Also you can use power-ups scatterd around the randomly generating map! - Faster movement - Double points - Magnet (Collects coins from further away) Made by . : Nitram1234 (M. Martin)
instructions: Move - W A S D Collect coins - On contact
